command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44TTARZqZm4zxSK.b3f2309fec40 --database VPbZo3VRZUT62wWDPHVeqm --execute 
-- Produtos do tenant 30001 (AESC Mãe de Deus)
SELECT id, sku, description, tenantId FROM products WHERE tenantId = 30001 ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;

-- Produtos do tenant 30002 (AESC UCG)
SELECT id, sku, description, tenantId FROM products WHERE tenantId = 30002 ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;

-- Verificar se há inventário do tenant 30001 com productId de produtos do tenant 30002
SELECT i.tenantId AS invTenant, i.productId, p.tenantId AS prodTenant, p.sku, i.quantity, i.status
FROM inventory i
JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
WHERE i.tenantId != p.tenantId
LIMIT 10;
